name: Boundary-Setting Decline
description: Writes a polite no for the requests you should turn down without burning the relationship. For the discounts, free work, and off-scope asks you want to decline cleanly instead of avoiding.
prompt_template: Draft a kind but firm reply that declines the request I describe below. Acknowledge what they asked, say no clearly without over-explaining or apologizing too much, and where it fits offer one alternative or a door left open. Match the tone in my brain so it sounds like me. Give it to me as a draft to approve before sending.
